# Backend Documentation Instructions

Use this file for work that writes or updates `docs/backend/`.

## Source of truth

- `backend/src/application/`
- `backend/src/domain/`
- `backend/src/infrastructure/`
- `backend/src/infra/`
- `backend/src/middleware/`
- `backend/src/routes/`
- `backend/src/controllers/`

## Cover

- use cases and services
- repository behavior
- middleware behavior
- validation and authorization behavior
- persistence side effects

## Do not confuse with

- user-facing product behavior summaries
- endpoint contract tables
- deployment/runbook material
